title: The Hollow Peaks: Secrets of the Ancients
description: A standalone adventure for seasoned explorers. Deep in the Hollow Peaks mountain range lies a forgotten dwarven hold, sealed for centuries. Strange lights have been spotted from the peaks, and a merchant's journal speaks of a treasure vault guarded by elemental wards and ancient puzzles. Glory — and danger — await those bold enough to seek the truth.

acts.name: The Road to the Peaks
acts.description: The journey to the Hollow Peaks is treacherous. Trolls and bears have claimed the wilderness roads, and a ruined waystation holds clues to the dwarven hold's entry. Exploration and survival are the key themes here.

encounters.name: Troll Under the Bridge
encounters.description: A troll has claimed the only bridge across the Gorge River. Negotiate, trick, or fight your way past.
encounters.exploration_note: Search the troll's pile of bones — something valuable may be hidden there.

encounters.name: Grizzly Bear Territory
encounters.description: A grizzly bear and her cubs block the narrow pass. Avoid or pacify — or fight if necessary.
encounters.exploration_note: Bears mark their territory. Finding the markings can let you navigate around them.

encounters.name: Ogre Camp at the Waystation
encounters.description: An ogre family has occupied the waystation. The merchant's journal is inside — you'll need to deal with them.
encounters.exploration_note: The journal is hidden under a loose floorboard — search the northwest room.

objectives.description: Reach the Gorge River bridge approach
Recover the merchant's journal from the waystation
Locate the hidden entrance to the Hollow Peaks hold
Speak with the trail warden about the hold's old approach

acts.name: The Elemental Wards
acts.description: Inside the dwarven hold, ancient elemental wards still function — earth, fire, air, and water guardians patrol the halls. Solving their puzzle locks is the only way to progress deeper. Combat and cunning both have their place.

encounters.name: The Fire Ward Chamber
encounters.description: A fire elemental emerges when the fire rune is disturbed. Use the water rune to nullify it — or overpower it directly.
encounters.puzzle_hint: The chamber has four water urns. Pour them in order: North, East, South, West. The fire elemental weakens at each step.

encounters.name: The Earth Ward Corridor
encounters.description: Earth elementals animate from the walls if the correct stone tiles are not pressed in sequence. One wrong step means a fight.
encounters.puzzle_hint: The tile pattern matches the constellation carved on the ceiling. Look up before you step.

encounters.name: The Dual Ward Guardian
encounters.description: An air and water elemental patrol the vault antechamber together. They cannot be separated — both must be defeated.
encounters.puzzle_hint: Each elemental is powered by a crystal. Destroy the crystals first to weaken them before engaging directly.

objectives.description: Overcome the Fire Ward Chamber
Survive the Earth Ward Corridor by defeating its defenders
Break the paired ward by defeating the air guardian
Reach the ancient vault door beyond the ward halls
Speak with the ward spirit bound to the antechamber

acts.name: The Vault of the Ancestors
acts.description: The vault itself is guarded by the most powerful wards: a wraith of the dwarven king, a beholder construct, and — in the deepest chamber — an ancient secret. Explorers who solve the final puzzle unlock the vault's legendary treasure.

encounters.name: The Wraith of King Durnvar
encounters.description: The undead spirit of the last dwarven king, Durnvar, protects the vault entrance. He cannot be reasoned with — only defeated.
encounters.exploration_note: The dwarven runes on the walls describe how Durnvar fell — they may reveal a weakness.

encounters.name: The Beholder Construct
encounters.description: An ancient dwarven beholder-construct — a mechanical anti-magic sentinel — guards the inner vault. Its eye rays trigger on movement.
encounters.puzzle_hint: The construct has a control panel behind it. Reach it without triggering the eye rays by crawling through the low maintenance tunnels on the sides.

encounters.name: The Final Puzzle: The Dwarven Codex
encounters.description: The vault's innermost chamber holds no monsters — only a great puzzle lock. Solve the Dwarven Codex to claim the treasure.
encounters.puzzle_hint: The Codex uses dwarven numerology: 1=stone, 2=fire, 3=water, 4=air. The sequence is carved on the sarcophagus lid.

objectives.description: Defeat the wraith of King Durnvar
Neutralize the beholder construct guarding the inner hall
Reach the codex chamber inside the vault
Claim the key-relic from the opened vault
Speak with the ancestor echo awakened by the vault

acts.name: The Cursed Marshlands
acts.description: Rumors of poisoned water and missing herbalists draw you south to the marshlands. A corrupted druid and a nest of swamp creatures block the path to a hidden grove where the land's blight can be undone.

encounters.name: Swamp Lurkers
encounters.description: Venomous creatures guard the entrance to the deeper marshes. Their poison saps strength.
encounters.exploration_note: Torches keep the leeches at bay. Search the reeds for a herbalist's satchel.

encounters.name: The Corrupted Druid
encounters.description: A once-benevolent druid has been twisted by dark magic. She commands the marsh creatures and must be stopped.
encounters.exploration_note: The druid's staff is the source of her power. Destroying it weakens her considerably.

encounters.name: The Cleansing Ritual
encounters.description: At the heart of the grove, perform the cleansing ritual using the reagents gathered along the way.
encounters.exploration_note: Place the swamp moss and cave lichen on the altar and speak the words from the herbalist's journal.

objectives.description: Clear the marsh entrance of swamp lurkers
Defeat the corrupted druid at the hidden grove
Recover the herbalist's journal from the reeds
Reach the grove altar and prepare the cleansing
Speak with the rescued herbalist about the final rite

acts.name: The Arcane Forgemaster
acts.description: Word has spread of a reclusive enchanter in the mountains who can teach the secret of binding elemental power into forged steel. The journey requires arcane crystals, elemental essences, and the courage to face the forge guardian. Those who succeed will craft weapons of legendary power.

encounters.name: Crystal Cavern Sentinels
encounters.description: Arcane constructs guard the crystal caverns where raw arcane crystals grow. They attack anything that disturbs the formations.
encounters.exploration_note: The crystals on the east wall are the purest. Harvest carefully — broken crystals lose their power.

encounters.name: The Essence Wellspring
encounters.description: A natural convergence of elemental energies creates a wellspring where essences can be harvested, but elemental creatures swarm around it protectively.
encounters.exploration_note: Glass vials can be filled directly from the wellspring. Each essence pool is marked by its elemental color.

encounters.name: The Forge Guardian
encounters.description: A massive enchanted construct guards the entrance to the ancient forge. It must be defeated or deactivated using the correct sequence of elemental essences.
encounters.puzzle_hint: Insert fire, then water, then storm essence into the three slots on the guardian's chest. The correct order weakens it before combat.

objectives.description: Harvest arcane crystals from the crystal caverns
Gather elemental essences from the wellspring
Defeat or deactivate the forge guardian
Reach the ancient enchanting forge beyond the guardian
Speak with the spirit of the ancient forgemaster

acts.name: The Plague Ward
acts.description: A plague has broken out in the mining camps south of the mountains. The camp doctor is overwhelmed and needs a skilled healer to help with triage, craft plague antidotes, and trace the source of the infection to a poisoned well. Time is running out for the miners.

encounters.name: Plague Rats
encounters.description: The mine tunnels are infested with plague-carrying rats. They must be cleared before the source can be reached.
encounters.exploration_note: The rats nest near the underground stream. Follow the discolored water to find the nest.

encounters.name: The Poisoned Wellspring
encounters.description: A corrupted water elemental has taken root in the camp wellspring, tainting the water supply with disease. Purify or destroy it.
encounters.exploration_note: The corruption can be weakened by pouring plague antidote into the three tributary streams before engaging.

encounters.name: Quarantine Triage
encounters.description: The sick miners need immediate medical attention. Use your healing supplies to stabilize the worst cases before the antidote can be distributed.
encounters.exploration_note: Healing salves for the wounds, fever tea for the burning, and plague antidote for the infection itself. Prioritize the children first.

objectives.description: Clear the plague rats from the mine tunnels
Purify the corrupted wellspring by defeating the water elemental
Collect plague samples from the infected mine water
Reach the quarantine ward in the mining camp
Speak with the camp doctor about the treatment plan

acts.name: The Proving Grounds
acts.description: A retired war-captain has reopened an ancient training arena in the foothills. Warriors, rogues, mages, and priests are invited to test their discipline against enchanted constructs and prove mastery of their class abilities. Only those who complete every trial earn the captain's endorsement.

encounters.name: The Gauntlet of Steel
encounters.description: A corridor of animated training dummies that attack in coordinated waves. Warriors must hold the line while companions take flanking positions.
encounters.exploration_note: The constructs reset after each wave. Use the rest between waves to practice Second Wind recovery.

encounters.name: The Shrine Trial
encounters.description: A consecrated chamber tests divine discipline. Priests must channel divinity to suppress waves of spectral undead while keeping allies alive with healing discipline.
encounters.exploration_note: Channel Divinity's turn undead effect weakens all spectral enemies in the chamber simultaneously.

encounters.name: The Shadow Course
encounters.description: A darkened obstacle course filled with pressure plates and magical sentries. Rogues must use evasion and cunning action to reach the end without alerting the arcane watchers.
encounters.exploration_note: Nimble Escape lets you disengage from sentries without spending AP. Use the shadows between pillars to reset stealth.

encounters.name: The Arcane Crucible
encounters.description: A chamber that drains spell energy with each round. Mages must conserve spell points and use Arcane Recovery at the right moment to outlast the magical drain.
encounters.exploration_note: Arcane Recovery restores spell points once per rest. Time it after the second drain wave for maximum efficiency.

objectives.description: Complete the Gauntlet of Steel training exercise
Pass the Shrine Trial using divine discipline
Navigate the Shadow Course without raising the alarm
Survive the Arcane Crucible by conserving spell energy
Report to the war-captain after completing all trials

acts.name: The Lost Caravan
acts.description: A merchant caravan vanished on the northern trade road. Bandits and worgs prowl the area, and the wreckage holds valuable trade goods. Find the survivors and recover what you can.

encounters.name: Bandit Scavengers
encounters.description: Bandits are looting the wrecked wagons when you arrive.
encounters.exploration_note: Search the wagons for trade manifests that reveal the full cargo.

encounters.name: Worg Pack
encounters.description: A pack of worgs tracked the blood trail from the caravan. They attack at dusk.
encounters.exploration_note: The worgs' den is nearby. Check it for survivors who may have been dragged there.

objectives.description: Find the caravan wreckage on the north road
Defeat the bandit scavengers
Defeat the worg pack
Recover the trade goods from the wagons
Speak with the surviving merchant

acts.name: The Haunted Mine
acts.description: Miners refuse to enter the old silver mine after reporting ghostly apparitions and strange noises. Investigate the haunting and clear the mine so operations can resume.

encounters.name: Ghostly Miners
encounters.description: The ghosts of dead miners wander the upper tunnels, reliving their final moments.
encounters.exploration_note: The ghosts carry spectral pickaxes. They may be appeased if you find their remains.

encounters.name: The Banshee of Shaft Seven
encounters.description: A banshee haunts the deepest shaft, her wail echoing through the tunnels.
encounters.exploration_note: The banshee was once the mine foreman's wife. Finding her locket may weaken her.

objectives.description: Enter the haunted silver mine
Put the ghostly miners to rest
Defeat the banshee in Shaft Seven
Collect silver ore from the cleared tunnels
Report to the mine foreman

acts.name: Monster Bounty: The Troll Bridge
acts.description: The bounty board posts a reward for clearing the troll that has taken residence under the Great Bridge. Multiple trolls have been spotted and travelers are being eaten.

encounters.name: Troll Lair Under the Bridge
encounters.description: Two trolls lurk beneath the bridge, ambushing anyone who tries to cross.
encounters.exploration_note: Trolls regenerate. Use fire or acid to stop their healing.

encounters.name: The Ogre Toll Collector
encounters.description: An ogre works with the trolls, collecting loot from victims.
encounters.exploration_note: The ogre's sack contains stolen goods from previous victims.

objectives.description: Reach the Great Bridge
Slay the trolls under the bridge
Defeat the ogre toll collectors
Collect proof of the kills for the bounty

acts.name: Rescue at Goblin Hold
acts.description: A farmer's children have been kidnapped by goblins and taken to their mountain hold. Time is short. Fight through the goblin defenses and rescue the captives before they are sold to slavers.

encounters.name: Goblin Gate Guard
encounters.description: Goblins guard the entrance to their mountain hold with crude barricades.
encounters.exploration_note: There is a side tunnel that bypasses the main gate if you look carefully.

encounters.name: Hobgoblin Slavers
encounters.description: Hobgoblin captains oversee the captive pens deep in the hold.
encounters.exploration_note: The captives are chained. Find the key on the hobgoblin captain's belt.

objectives.description: Enter the goblin mountain hold
Defeat the goblin gate guards
Defeat the hobgoblin slavers
Free and speak with the captive children

acts.name: The Basilisk Artifact
acts.description: An antiquarian has located a petrified temple containing a powerful artifact. Basilisks roam its halls, turning intruders to stone. Navigate carefully and claim the relic.

encounters.name: Basilisk Den
encounters.description: Basilisks nest among the petrified statues of previous adventurers.
encounters.exploration_note: Mirrors can reflect the basilisk's gaze. Search the entry hall for polished shields.

encounters.name: Cockatrice Flock
encounters.description: Cockatrices roosting in the upper levels swoop down to attack intruders.
encounters.exploration_note: Cockatrices are weaker than basilisks but faster. Keep moving.

objectives.description: Enter the petrified temple
Defeat the basilisks in the den
Clear the cockatrice flock
Retrieve the artifact from the inner sanctum
Return the artifact to the antiquarian

acts.name: The Sunken Ruins
acts.description: A drought has revealed ancient ruins in a dried lakebed. Explore the crumbling structures, avoid traps, and deal with the undead that still guard the site.

encounters.name: Skeleton Patrol
encounters.description: Skeletons march endlessly through the ruined corridors.
encounters.exploration_note: The skeletons follow a set patrol route. Time your movements to avoid large groups.

encounters.name: Wraith of the High Priest
encounters.description: The wraith of a long-dead priest guards the temple treasury.
encounters.exploration_note: Holy water from the altar font can weaken the wraith.

objectives.description: Explore the sunken ruins
Clear the skeleton patrols
Defeat the wraith guardian
Collect ancient relics from the treasury

acts.name: The Puzzle Dungeon of Korrath
acts.description: An eccentric wizard built a dungeon of mechanical puzzles and guardian constructs. The reward for completing all puzzles is said to be immense, but none have survived the final chamber.

encounters.name: Clay Golem Sentries
encounters.description: Clay golems guard the first puzzle chamber, attacking anyone who touches the wrong lever.
encounters.exploration_note: The correct lever sequence is carved on the floor tiles in dwarven runes.

encounters.name: Stone Golem Final Guardian
encounters.description: A stone golem stands in the final chamber, the last test of the dungeon.
encounters.exploration_note: The golem has a weak point on its back where the control gem is exposed.

objectives.description: Enter the Puzzle Dungeon of Korrath
Defeat the clay golem sentries
Defeat the stone golem final guardian
Claim the wizard's treasure hoard

acts.name: Escort to the Mountain Pass
acts.description: A group of refugees needs safe passage through a treacherous mountain pass infested with giants and wyverns. Protect them from ambush along the narrow trails.

encounters.name: Hill Giant Ambush
encounters.description: Hill giants roll boulders down the narrow pass to crush the refugee column.
encounters.exploration_note: Scout ahead to spot the ambush positions before the refugees arrive.

encounters.name: Manticore Aerial Assault
encounters.description: Manticores dive-bomb the column from the mountain peaks.
encounters.exploration_note: The manticores nest on the highest ledge. Destroying the nest discourages them.

objectives.description: Begin the escort at the pass entrance
Defeat the hill giant ambushers
Repel the manticore aerial assault
Ensure the refugees reach safety and speak with their leader

acts.name: The Werewolf Investigation
acts.description: Villagers are going missing during full moons. Investigate the disappearances, track the werewolf to its lair, and put an end to the curse before more innocents fall.

encounters.name: Werewolf Pack
encounters.description: A pack of werewolves emerges under the full moon to hunt.
encounters.exploration_note: Silver weapons deal extra damage to werewolves. Check the blacksmith for silver bolts.

encounters.name: The Alpha Werewolf
encounters.description: The alpha werewolf is the source of the curse. Defeating it may lift the affliction from the others.
encounters.exploration_note: The alpha retreats to a cave when wounded. Follow the blood trail.

objectives.description: Investigate the disappearances in the village
Defeat the werewolf hunting pack
Track and defeat the alpha werewolf
Report to the village survivors
Collect werewolf pelts as proof

acts.name: Treasure Map: The Pirate Cove
acts.description: You found a treasure map leading to a hidden pirate cove. Navigate past traps, fight the undead pirates who still guard their loot, and claim the legendary treasure.

encounters.name: Undead Pirates
encounters.description: Skeleton pirates defend the cove entrance, cutlasses in hand.
encounters.exploration_note: The tide reveals a hidden path to the cove at low water.

encounters.name: The Ghost Captain
encounters.description: The ghost of the pirate captain haunts the treasure vault.
encounters.exploration_note: The captain's logbook reveals the combination to the treasure chest.

objectives.description: Find the hidden pirate cove
Defeat the undead pirate crew
Defeat the ghost captain
Open the treasure chest and claim the loot

acts.name: The Imp Infestation
acts.description: A wizard's tower has been overrun by imps after a summoning went wrong. Clear the tower floor by floor and seal the portal they came through.

encounters.name: Imp Swarm
encounters.description: Dozens of imps have infested the lower floors, causing chaos.
encounters.exploration_note: Imps are vulnerable to cold damage. Look for frost scrolls in the wizard's study.

encounters.name: Succubus Summoner
encounters.description: A succubus controls the portal from the tower's top floor.
encounters.exploration_note: Destroying the summoning circle will weaken the succubus and stop reinforcements.

objectives.description: Enter the infested wizard's tower
Clear the imp infestation
Defeat the succubus controlling the portal
Recover the wizard's stolen scrolls
Report to the tower's wizard owner

acts.name: The Orc Bounty
acts.description: The local lord has placed a bounty on the orc war camp that has been raiding nearby farms. Assault the camp, defeat the orc warriors, and claim the bounty.

encounters.name: Orc Perimeter Guard
encounters.description: Orc warriors stand watch at the camp's perimeter with worg sentries.
encounters.exploration_note: The guards change shift at midnight. That is the best time to strike.

encounters.name: Orc War Chief
encounters.description: The orc war chief commands from the central tent, surrounded by his best fighters.
encounters.exploration_note: The war chief's tent contains a battle map showing future raid targets.

objectives.description: Locate the orc war camp
Defeat the orc perimeter guards
Defeat the orc war chief and his retinue
Recover the battle map from the chief's tent
Report to the local lord to claim the bounty

acts.name: The Drow Artifact Hunt
acts.description: A drow artifact has surfaced in a cave system near the surface. Drow elite warriors race to reclaim it. Beat them to the prize and secure the artifact for the surface world.

encounters.name: Drow Scouts
encounters.description: Drow elite scouts guard the cave entrance, using darkness to their advantage.
encounters.exploration_note: Torches and light spells negate the drow's darkvision advantage.

encounters.name: Phase Spider Guardians
encounters.description: Phase spiders serve as the drow's guardians in the deeper tunnels.
encounters.exploration_note: Phase spiders vanish between attacks. Area spells can catch them mid-phase.

objectives.description: Enter the cave system
Defeat the drow scouts
Defeat the phase spider guardians
Secure the drow artifact

acts.name: The Elemental Nexus
acts.description: An elemental nexus has destabilized, spewing creatures of fire and earth into the surrounding countryside. Venture to the nexus and restore balance before it tears the land apart.

encounters.name: Fire Elemental Outbreak
encounters.description: Fire elementals rage across the scorched fields.
encounters.exploration_note: Water from the nearby river can be used to create steam barriers.

encounters.name: Earth Elemental Blockade
encounters.description: Earth elementals have formed a wall around the nexus core.
encounters.exploration_note: Mining picks can crack the elemental's stone armor if you find the seams.

encounters.name: Nexus Core Guardian
encounters.description: A water elemental and fire elemental clash at the nexus core. Both must be stopped.
encounters.exploration_note: Restore the nexus crystals in the correct order: earth, water, fire, air.

objectives.description: Reach the destabilized elemental nexus
Defeat the fire elemental outbreak
Break through the earth elemental blockade
Calm the water elemental at the core
Collect elemental essences from the nexus

acts.name: The Vampire's Manor
acts.description: A noble family's manor has been taken over by a vampire. Investigate the disappearances, navigate the trap-filled manor, and confront the vampire lord in its crypt.

encounters.name: Zombie Servants
encounters.description: The manor's former servants, now zombified, shamble through the halls.
encounters.exploration_note: The servants' quarters contain a key to the cellar entrance.

encounters.name: The Vampire Lord
encounters.description: The vampire lord awaits in the manor's underground crypt.
encounters.exploration_note: Sunlight from the broken skylight can be redirected with mirrors to weaken the vampire.

objectives.description: Enter the vampire's manor
Clear the zombie servants from the manor
Defeat the vampire lord in the crypt
Recover the noble family's heirlooms
Return the heirlooms to the noble family

acts.name: The Shambling Swamp
acts.description: A shambling mound colony has overgrown an old druid grove. The local herbalists cannot reach their medicinal plants. Clear the overgrowth and restore access to the grove.

encounters.name: Shambling Mound Colony
encounters.description: Shambling mounds block every path through the swamp.
encounters.exploration_note: Fire and cold damage prevent the mounds from regenerating.

encounters.name: The Green Hag Manipulator
encounters.description: A green hag has been feeding the shambling mounds, growing them to immense size.
encounters.exploration_note: The hag disguises herself as a friendly druid. Be cautious of strangers in the swamp.

objectives.description: Reach the overgrown druid grove
Destroy the shambling mound colony
Defeat the green hag manipulator
Gather medicinal herbs from the restored grove
Report to the lead herbalist

acts.name: The Iron Golem Factory
acts.description: An abandoned dwarven factory has reactivated on its own, producing iron golems that march out and attack nearby settlements. Shut down the factory before an army of constructs is assembled.

encounters.name: Golem Assembly Line
encounters.description: Partially assembled golems activate and attack as you enter the factory floor.
encounters.exploration_note: The control panels on the walls can shut down individual assembly stations.

encounters.name: The Master Golem
encounters.description: A fully assembled iron golem guards the factory's control room.
encounters.exploration_note: Overloading the power conduit will stun the iron golem for one round.

objectives.description: Enter the reactivated golem factory
Destroy the assembly line golems
Defeat the master iron golem
Salvage mithral from the factory stores

acts.name: The Mummy's Tomb
acts.description: Grave robbers accidentally unsealed an ancient tomb, releasing mummies and their death curse. Enter the tomb, defeat the mummy lord, and reseal the crypt.

encounters.name: Mummy Guardians
encounters.description: Mummies rise from their sarcophagi as you enter the burial chamber.
encounters.exploration_note: The mummies are bound by the hieroglyphs on the walls. Defacing them weakens the curse.

encounters.name: The Death Knight's Vigil
encounters.description: A death knight guards the innermost chamber where the seal stone lies.
encounters.exploration_note: The death knight was once a holy paladin. Remnants of its honor may be exploited.

objectives.description: Enter the unsealed tomb
Defeat the mummy guardians
Defeat the death knight guardian
Collect gems from the tomb treasury before resealing

acts.name: The Hag's Bargain
acts.description: A village has made a bargain with a green hag for protection, but the price is growing too steep. Break the contract by entering the hag's domain and destroying the binding totem.

encounters.name: Enchanted Forest Guardians
encounters.description: Treants corrupted by the hag block the path to her domain.
encounters.exploration_note: The treants can be calmed with druidic chants if you learned them from the village elder.

encounters.name: The Green Hag's Lair
encounters.description: The hag defends her domain with illusions and dark magic.
encounters.exploration_note: One hag is an illusion. True sight or dispel magic reveals the fake.

objectives.description: Enter the hag's forest domain
Defeat the corrupted treant guardian
Defeat the green hags
Destroy and collect the binding totem fragments
Return to the village with proof the bargain is broken

acts.name: The Chimera Hunt
acts.description: A chimera has been terrorizing livestock and travelers in the hill country. Track the beast to its mountaintop den and slay it for a hefty bounty.

encounters.name: Chimera's Hunting Grounds
encounters.description: The chimera swoops from the sky to attack on the open hillside.
encounters.exploration_note: The chimera circles before diving. Watch the sky for its shadow.

encounters.name: The Chimera's Den
encounters.description: A second chimera guards the den and its hatchlings.
encounters.exploration_note: The den entrance is narrow. The chimera cannot fly inside.

objectives.description: Track the chimera to its hunting grounds
Slay the chimeras
Defeat the cockatrice in the den
Collect chimera heads as proof for the bounty

acts.name: The Black Pudding Cellar
acts.description: A tavern's wine cellar has been invaded by black puddings that dissolved through the bedrock. Clear them out before the entire building collapses into the underground cavity.

encounters.name: Pudding Infestation
encounters.description: Black puddings ooze through the cellar walls, dissolving everything they touch.
encounters.exploration_note: Slashing black puddings splits them into smaller puddings. Use blunt or magic attacks.

encounters.name: The Source Cavity
encounters.description: A massive ochre jelly blocks the underground cavity that the puddings emerged from.
encounters.exploration_note: Collapsing the cavity entrance with explosives will seal it permanently.

objectives.description: Enter the infested cellar
Destroy the black puddings
Destroy the ochre jellies
Report the all-clear to the tavern keeper

acts.name: The Yuan-ti Nest
acts.description: Yuan-ti abominations have established a nest in the ruins of an old temple. Their expansion threatens to overrun the surrounding villages. Destroy the nest before they grow too powerful.

encounters.name: Yuan-ti Scouts
encounters.description: Yuan-ti scouts patrol the temple perimeter with their serpent minions.
encounters.exploration_note: The yuan-ti use heat vision. Cold spells can mask your thermal signature.

encounters.name: The Brood Mother
encounters.description: The yuan-ti brood mother guards the egg chamber deep in the temple.
encounters.exploration_note: Destroying the eggs will enrage the brood mother but prevent future threats.

objectives.description: Enter the yuan-ti occupied temple
Defeat the yuan-ti scout patrols
Defeat the brood mother and clear the nest
Collect yuan-ti scales for the alchemist
Deliver the scales to the village alchemist

acts.name: The Bugbear Fortress
acts.description: A bugbear chief has fortified an old watchtower and is using it as a base to raid trade routes. Storm the fortress and defeat the chief to restore safe passage.

encounters.name: Bugbear Sentries
encounters.description: Bugbear sentries with crossbows guard the tower's approaches.
encounters.exploration_note: The tower has a hidden sewer entrance on the north side.

encounters.name: The Bugbear Chief
encounters.description: The bugbear chief fights from the tower's top floor, hurling boulders.
encounters.exploration_note: The chief's warbanner provides morale to his troops. Destroy it first.

objectives.description: Reach the bugbear fortress
Defeat the bugbear sentries
Defeat the bugbear chief at the tower top
Recover stolen trade goods from the fortress stores
Report to the merchant guild about the cleared route

acts.name: The Gnoll Slavers
acts.description: Gnoll packmasters have been capturing travelers and selling them in underground slave markets. Infiltrate their operation, free the captives, and shut down the network.

encounters.name: Gnoll Patrol
encounters.description: A gnoll packmaster leads a patrol with dire wolf companions.
encounters.exploration_note: The gnolls communicate with hyena-like calls. Silence spells disrupt coordination.

encounters.name: The Slave Pens
encounters.description: The gnoll packmaster oversees the slave pens from a fortified position.
encounters.exploration_note: The captives can assist in the fight if freed from their chains first.

objectives.description: Find the gnoll slaver camp
Defeat the gnoll patrol
Defeat the gnoll slavers at the pens
Free the captive travelers
Collect evidence of the slave network

acts.name: The Cultist Hideout
acts.description: A demon cult has established a hidden temple in the city sewers. Their rituals threaten to summon a shadow demon. Find the hideout and destroy it before the summoning is complete.

encounters.name: Cultist Guards
encounters.description: Cultist fanatics guard the sewer entrance to the hidden temple.
encounters.exploration_note: The cultists wear distinctive amulets. Destroying them disrupts their dark blessing.

encounters.name: The Summoning Chamber
encounters.description: The head cultist attempts to complete the shadow demon summoning.
encounters.exploration_note: Breaking the summoning circle before the ritual completes weakens the demon significantly.

objectives.description: Find the cultist hideout in the sewers
Defeat the cultist guards
Stop the summoning and defeat the shadow demon
Collect the cult's ritual texts as evidence
Report the cult to the city guard captain

acts.name: The Frost Giant's Toll
acts.description: A frost giant has seized a critical mountain pass and demands tribute from all who wish to cross. Either pay the toll, find an alternate route, or defeat the giant to reopen the pass.

encounters.name: The Frost Giant and Wolves
encounters.description: The frost giant stands with dire wolves at its feet, blocking the pass.
encounters.exploration_note: The giant's weakness is fire. Its thick furs are highly flammable.

encounters.name: Winter Wolves of the Pass
encounters.description: Additional wolves ambush from the snowdrifts during the fight.
encounters.exploration_note: The snowdrifts provide cover. Use them to avoid the giant's thrown boulders.

objectives.description: Reach the frost giant's mountain pass
Defeat the frost giant
Defeat the wolves guarding the pass
Loot the giant's treasure pile

acts.name: The Sahuagin Raiders
acts.description: Sahuagin priestesses lead raids on coastal villages from their underwater caves. Dive into the coastal caves and end the raids by defeating their leadership.

encounters.name: Sahuagin Cave Guards
encounters.description: Sahuagin priestesses guard the cave entrance with water magic.
encounters.exploration_note: The caves flood at high tide. Time your assault for low tide.

encounters.name: The Deep Priestess
encounters.description: The high priestess performs rituals in the deepest cave chamber.
encounters.exploration_note: Disrupting the ritual circle removes the priestess's magical shield.

objectives.description: Enter the sahuagin coastal caves
Defeat the sahuagin cave guards
Defeat the deep priestess
Collect pearls from the sahuagin treasury
Report the victory to the coastal fishermen

acts.name: The Mind Flayer Conspiracy
acts.description: People in the capital are behaving strangely, their wills sapped by psionic influence. Trace the conspiracy to a mind flayer hidden beneath the city and destroy it before the entire population falls under thrall.

encounters.name: Thralled Guards
encounters.description: City guards, thralled by the mind flayer, attack on sight in the underground tunnels.
encounters.exploration_note: The thralled guards can be freed if the mind flayer's control is broken.

encounters.name: The Mind Flayer's Chamber
encounters.description: The mind flayer lurks in a chamber deep beneath the city, surrounded by psionic amplifiers.
encounters.exploration_note: Destroying the psionic amplifiers before engaging halves the mind flayer's power.

objectives.description: Investigate the strange behavior in the capital
Subdue the thralled guards
Destroy the mind flayer and free the populace
Collect the psionic amplifier crystals
Report to the city magistrate

acts.name: The Spider Silk Harvest
acts.description: Tailors need giant spider silk for enchanted robes, but the spider caves are dangerous. Clear the caves of hostile spiders and harvest the precious silk safely.

encounters.name: Giant Spider Nest
encounters.description: Giant spiders fill the upper caves with thick webs.
encounters.exploration_note: Fire clears webs quickly but may damage the silk. Use blades for careful cutting.

encounters.name: Phase Spider Matriarch
encounters.description: A phase spider matriarch guards the deepest silk deposits.
encounters.exploration_note: The matriarch's silk is the most valuable. Harvest it carefully after the fight.

objectives.description: Enter the spider caves
Clear the giant spider nest
Defeat the phase spider matriarch
Harvest spider silk from the caves
Deliver the silk to the master tailor

acts.name: The Beholder's Gallery
acts.description: An ancient gallery filled with petrified adventurers is home to a beholder that collects trophies. Enter the gallery to rescue a petrified ally and defeat the aberration.

encounters.name: Gallery Guardians
encounters.description: Basilisks serve as the beholder's gallery guards, adding to its collection.
encounters.exploration_note: Mirrors on the gallery walls can reflect the basilisk's gaze back at it.

encounters.name: The Beholder Curator
encounters.description: The beholder floats among its petrified collection, eye rays sweeping the gallery.
encounters.exploration_note: The beholder's central eye projects an anti-magic cone. Approach from its blind spots.

objectives.description: Enter the beholder's gallery
Defeat the basilisk guards
Defeat the beholder curator
Collect gems from the beholder's hoard

acts.name: The Treant Grove Awakening
acts.description: Ancient treants have awakened in a sacred grove, angry at loggers who have been felling their kin. Mediate the conflict or choose a side. If combat is unavoidable, the treants are formidable foes.

encounters.name: Angry Treants
encounters.description: Treants march toward the logging camp, crushing everything in their path.
encounters.exploration_note: The treants can be calmed if you offer to stop the logging. Diplomacy is an option.

encounters.name: The Elder Treant
encounters.description: The eldest treant, filled with ancient wrath, is the hardest to appease.
encounters.exploration_note: Planting a moonpetal seed at the grove's heart may calm the elder.

objectives.description: Reach the sacred treant grove
Defeat or calm the angry treants
Clear the shambling mound from the path
Collect rare heartwood from fallen treants
Negotiate with the logging camp foreman

acts.name: The Ancient Red Dragon
acts.description: The most legendary bounty ever posted: an ancient red dragon has awoken from its centuries-long slumber. Only the most powerful adventurers dare attempt this hunt. The reward is beyond imagination.

encounters.name: Fire Giant Thralls
encounters.description: Fire giant warriors, enslaved by the ancient dragon, guard the volcanic approach.
encounters.exploration_note: The fire giants are compelled by fear. Breaking the dragon's aura may free them.

encounters.name: The Ancient Red Dragon
encounters.description: The ancient red dragon, largest and most fearsome of all dragonkind, awaits in its volcanic throne room.
encounters.exploration_note: This is the hardest fight in the game. Bring every potion, scroll, and ally you have.

objectives.description: Reach the ancient dragon's volcanic lair
Defeat the fire giant thralls
Slay the ancient red dragon
Claim the legendary dragon hoard
Present proof to the king for the ultimate bounty

acts.name: The Lich's Library
acts.description: A dead lich's library has been discovered, filled with forbidden knowledge and undead guardians. Scholars want the books, but the library's defenses still function. Clear it out and recover the tomes.

encounters.name: Undead Librarians
encounters.description: Wraiths and skeletons patrol the library stacks endlessly.
encounters.exploration_note: The books are fragile. Avoid fire spells in the library to preserve the collection.

encounters.name: The Lich's Final Ward
encounters.description: A death knight serves as the lich's final ward, bound to protect the innermost vault of books.
encounters.exploration_note: The death knight's binding can be broken by reading the release incantation from the lich's own journal.

objectives.description: Enter the lich's library
Clear the undead librarians
Defeat the death knight final ward
Collect the rare tomes from the vault
Deliver the tomes to the head scholar
